hero.title: Explore Algeria with Your AI Guide
hero.subtitle: Discover the hidden gems of Algeria — from the Sahara sands to Mediterranean shores — with a personal AI companion by your side.
hero.botGreeting: Hello! I'm your Tolk guide. Ready to explore Algeria?
hero.botHint: Ask me anything about destinations, culture, or travel tips.

experiences.title: Cultural Experiences
experiences.gastronomyDesc: Savor Algeria's diverse culinary heritage from couscous to street food
experiences.craftsmanshipDesc: Discover traditional Berber crafts, pottery, and woven textiles
experiences.traditionDesc: Experience centuries-old customs, music, and festivals
experiences.artDesc: Explore prehistoric rock art and contemporary Algerian creativity

ai.title: Your Personal Tolk Guide
ai.subtitle: Real-time AI assistance that learns your preferences and helps you plan the perfect Algerian adventure.
ai.chat1: What are the best places to visit in southern Algeria?
ai.chat2: I recommend starting with Ghardaïa's M'zab Valley, then heading to the Hoggar Mountains for stunning volcanic landscapes, and finishing at Tassili n'Ajjer for prehistoric rock art.
ai.chat3: Can you help me plan a 7-day itinerary?

discover.chatResponse: I recommend starting with Ghardaïa's M'zab Valley, then heading to the Hoggar Mountains for stunning volcanic landscapes, and finishing at Tassili n'Ajjer for prehistoric rock art.

explore.aiGuideMessage: Ask me anything about this destination — from the best photo spots to local customs and nearby attractions.
explore.bookingDesc: Plan your trip with personalized recommendations and instant assistance from Tolk.

footer.description: Your personal AI-powered guide to exploring Algeria's rich heritage, culture, and hidden gems.
